commands.review_summary:
Adds a storage-neutral transcript-reader facade, routes selected gateway/agent/status/TUI transcript read callers through it, and adds a CI ratchet for migrated files.

PR surface: Source +508, Tests +335, Config +6, Other +239. Total +1088 across 40 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a staged refactor PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection and live Gateway proof cover representative routed reader behavior after the patch.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is required because the PR has a protected maintainer label and the remaining blocker is migration-stack/session-state sequencing, not a concrete repair finding.

target.title: refactor: add transcript reader seam
target.body:
## What

Path 3 / PR 3.1b transcript readers: add a storage-agnostic transcript reader facade and route storage-neutral transcript read/tail/stats/message lookup/projection callers through it. Refs #88838.

## Why

The session accessor seam from PR 3.1a gives the SQLite decomposition a clean branch-by-abstraction point, but transcript readers still needed a caller-facing seam before any SQLite-backed transcript store can replace the file-backed implementation. This keeps current file-backed behavior while removing direct reader coupling from gateway, agent, status, and TUI caller paths.

## Changes

- Add `src/gateway/session-transcript-readers.ts`
- Route gateway transcript readers
- Route agent/TUI/status readers
- Route `sessions.files` transcript scan
- Add narrow migrated-file reader ratchet
- Keep `session-utils.ts` compatibility exports
- Leave auto-reply/file-semantic paths unchanged

| Area | Change |
|------|--------|
| Gateway chat/history | Scoped reads for chat history, message lookup, SSE history, artifacts, image attachment indexing, reset hooks, session events, and session-linked files |
| Agent tools/runtime | Scoped reads for embedded gateway stub, sessions history/list tools, subagent output/recovery, and restart recovery |
| Compatibility | `session-utils.ts` reader re-exports now pass through the transcript reader facade |
| CI ratchet | Migrated files cannot re-import legacy transcript reader functions from `session-utils` modules |

Source branch commits after refresh onto current `main`:

- `208d392749` - `refactor: add transcript reader seam facade`
- `77dfbfa91f` - `refactor: route transcript readers through facade`

No storage flip, runtime dual-read/fallback, SQLite schema work, or SQLite runtime wiring is included.

## Testing

Exact-head local proof on `77dfbfa91fdc273dc5b92984e91931deb593816d`:

```text
$ node scripts/check-session-transcript-reader-boundary.mjs
session transcript reader boundary guard passed.

$ node scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.mjs
session accessor boundary guard passed.

$ git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD
passed

$ OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache-pr89121-rerebase-reader3 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/session-transcript-readers.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/sessions-files.test.ts test/scripts/check-session-transcript-reader-boundary.test.ts test/scripts/ci-workflow-guards.test.ts
passed 3 Vitest shards; 6 files, 46 tests

$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/pr89121-rerebase-test-src-3.tsbuildinfo
passed

$ git diff --name-only upstream/main...HEAD | rg '\.(ts|mjs)$' | xargs node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs
passed

$ .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main
autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported
```

Behavior addressed: transcript reader callers now use the 3.1a reader seam while preserving file-backed behavior.
Real environment tested: local Codex worktree; GitHub CI/Testbox running on exact head `77dfbfa91fdc273dc5b92984e91931deb593816d`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest shards for reader facade, session files, guard tests, and CI workflow guard; boundary guards; test-source type probe; oxlint; diff check; autoreview.
Evidence after fix: all exact-head local proof listed above passed; branch is rebased onto current `main`.
Observed result after fix: migrated gateway, agent, status, TUI, and `sessions.files` reader paths use `session-transcript-readers.ts`; the narrow guard blocks migrated files from re-importing legacy transcript reader functions.
What was not tested: local full `pnpm test`; broad verification is left to the GitHub CI/Testbox matrix on the exact pushed head.


## Real behavior proof (local gateway, 2026-06-15)

Ran the PR build from head `77dfbfa91fdc273dc5b92984e91931deb593816d` as the local foreground Gateway on `127.0.0.1:18789`, with the existing LaunchAgent stopped during the run and `~/.openclaw` as the working directory. The foreground process was `/Users/phaedrus/.codex/worktrees/fc70/clawdbot/dist/index.js gateway run --port 18789 --bind loopback --compact`; `openclaw gateway status --json` reported the listening process from the PR worktree and RPC `admin_capable` connectivity.

Real agent session created through Gateway:

- Session key: `agent:main:pr89121-transcript-proof-20260615-0820`
- Session id: `87c30c31-0d02-4971-80f5-1a217d683c99`
- Session file: `/Users/phaedrus/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/87c30c31-0d02-4971-80f5-1a217d683c99.jsonl`
- Model/runtime: `openai/gpt-5.5`, embedded OpenClaw runner
- Three successful turns: one `exec` tool turn, one workspace `exec` artifact turn, and one `write` tool turn for session-file scanning.

Transcript-reader behavior exercised through Gateway RPCs:

- `chat.history` returned 12 messages for that session, including redacted marker roles/ids: user `168ddf77`, assistant tool call `ccc56751`, tool result `35d162ca`, final assistant `d4e631c3`, second turn ids `2b4e5bbc`/`2bb9fbb9`/`643195ce`/`a3d00c9c`, and write turn ids `3727582a`/`46e457e6`/`192d04ed`/`d183186f`.
- `chat.message.get` for `d183186f` returned `ok: true`, role `assistant`, OpenClaw metadata `seq: 12`, and text `write-pong-pr89121-20260615-0820`.
- `sessions.files.list` returned workspace root `/Users/phaedrus/clawd` and one touched file from the transcript scanner: `/Users/phaedrus/clawd/tmp/openclaw-pr89121-write-proof.txt`, kind `modified`, `missing: false`, size 37.
- `sessions.files.get` for that touched file returned content `pr89121-20260615-0820 write artifact`.
- Direct facade probe against the same real session scope returned `readSessionMessageCountAsync = 12`, `readRecentSessionMessagesWithStatsAsync.totalMessages = 12`, recent tail length 5, transcript path matching the session file above, and `visitSessionMessagesAsync = 12`.

This covers the requested representative transcript history, message lookup, count/stat, artifact scan, and session-file read paths through the PR transcript-reader facade on a live local Gateway.
